_doc: Special-params index. Keys: 'provider/model' (model-specific) or 'provider' (provider-wide fallback). A model entry overrides a provider entry. Consulted by the capability probes (add an entry instead of generalising code). _probe_policy scopes empirical probing.

_probe_policy.note: openai/anthropic stay softprobe-only (paid / not installed). openrouter + pollinations: probe only a few.
